calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Gary Cloutier, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ALLIANCE CREDIT SERVICES, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) THOMAS TIMOTHY UPDIKE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declaration filed in support of Default Prove-Up is admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,907.94
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $13,507.96
Attorney's Fees: are waived in open court.
Costs: $474.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $45,890.40
Judgment signed in open court.
